chapter_title: Answer Figure Embedded In Question Figure

passages.passage_text: In the following questions, a question figure is given with four answer figures (a), (b), (c) and (d). Find out that answer figure which is embedded in the question figure.

solutions.solution: (a) Clearly, answer figure (a) is embedded in question figure and has been shown in the below figure.
(c) Clearly, the answer figure (d) is embedded in question figure and has been shown in the below figure.
(d) Clearly, answer figure (d) is embedded in question figure and has been shown in the below figure.
(a) Clearly, answer figure (a) is embedded in question figure and has been shown in the below figure.
(a) Clearly, answer figure (a) is embedded in question figure and has been shown in the adjacent figure.
